w-5","children":["$","path",null,{"d":"M8 0a8 8 0 0 0-2.53 15.59c.4.07.55-.17.55-.38l-.01-1.49c-2.01.37-2.53-.49-2.69-.94-.09-.23-.48-.94-.82-1.13-.28-.15-.68-.52-.01-.53.63-.01 1.08.58 1.23.82.72 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"prefer-a-video-weve-got-you-covered","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Prefer a video? We've got you covered!",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#prefer-a-video-weve-got-you-covered","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-center","children":[" ",["$","iframe",null,{"src":"https://www.youtube.com/embed/4XdHT5Y7zj4","title":"$undefined","width":"100%","allow":"accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; fullscreen","loading":"lazy","credentialless":"true","className":"rounded-lg shadow-lg"}],"$undefined"]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"headsup-release-live-stream-tomorrow","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Heads-up: Release Live stream tomorrow",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#headsup-release-live-stream-tomorrow","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"We have the Nx live stream on Thursday, March 9th at 7 PM CET, to talk about all the features that went into Nx 15.7 and 15.8. So tune in to ask your questions :)"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Enable notifications here:",["$","br",null,{}],["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://www.youtube.com/live/P3TinTe3O2g?feature=share","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"https://www.youtube.com/live/P3TinTe3O2g?feature=share","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"rustifying-the-nx-hasher","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Rustifying the Nx Hasher",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#rustifying-the-nx-hasher","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Starting with Nx 15.8, we now have a Rust-based Hasher enabled by default!"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Performance is at the core of what we do at Nx. Hence it isn't surprising that Nx is the fastest JS-based monorepo solution out there. We've shown ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/vsavkin/large-monorepo","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"that a couple of times","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],". But every millisecond counts! As such, we decided to experiment with Rust to see whether we could further optimize our project graph creation as well as the hasher function that is used for the ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/features/cache-task-results","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"computation cache","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],"."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Our original implementation used Git to calculate the hash. But it had some downsides as"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"it didn't work if you don't have or use Git (obviously)"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"it didn't work if you used Git submodules"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"it became super slow if you had a lot of file changes on your Git working tree, like when switching between branches"}],["$","li",null,{"children":["it triggered a lot of ",["$","code",null,{"children":"execSync"}]," calls to get different git status which was a fragile implementation"]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"In some situations where we couldn't rely on or use the Git hasher, we did a fallback to a node implementation which made things even slower."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"All nice and good, but show me the numbers!"}]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"So we did run some experiments on a small repo:"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"avg. time for Rust hasher: 17ms"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"avg. time for Git hasher: 24ms"}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["We also tried it on the ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/nrwl/nx","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Nx repository","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," itself:"]}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"Rust hasher: 50ms"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"Git hasher: 69ms"}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"When running these tests on Windows (not WSL), the Nx repo hashing timings turned out to be"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"Rust hasher: 72ms"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"Git hasher: 330ms"}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Right now, we only observed the Rust hasher to be slightly slower on large repositories when you don't have any changes. Once you start making changes the Git hasher becomes slower again and is overtaken by the Rust version which remains stable in performance."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["An interesting side-effect of using the Rust-based hasher is the size of the generated hashes, which are much smaller and thus allow for a quicker serialization between the ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/concepts/nx-daemon","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Nx Daemon","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," and Nx."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Future work"}]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"While we started with the hasher optimization, the next implementation we're exploring is using a binary format to communicate between the Nx Daemon and the Nx client. Currently, we serialize the JSON to a string and pass that through an IPC socket. Using a binary format will significantly speed up the communication here."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Opting out"}]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"We build the binary for the Rust hasher for:"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"macOS x64"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"macOS arm"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"linux arm"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"linux gnu"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"linux musl"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"windows arm64"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"windows x64"}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["As such, it should work on most CI and local developer machines. If we missed something, please reach out an ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/nrwl/nx","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"open an issue on GitHub","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],"! In case something breaks though, you can also disable the Rust hasher by using the environment variable ",["$","code",null,{"children":"NX_NON_NATIVE_HASHER=true"}],"."]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"deno-support","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Deno Support",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#deno-support","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-center","children":[" ",["$","iframe",null,{"src":"https://www.youtube.com/embed/NpH8cFSp51E","title":"$undefined","width":"100%","allow":"accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; fullscreen","loading":"lazy","credentialless":"true","className":"rounded-lg shadow-lg"}],"$undefined"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Nx Deno support ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/blog/nx-15-7-node-support-angular-lts-lockfile-pruning","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"already landed in 15.7","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],", but didn't make it into the blog post. So here we go: we have a brand new Nx Deno plugin published at ",["$","code",null,{"children":"@nrwl/deno"}],". For now, it is experimental and lives in our ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/nrwl/nx-labs","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"labs repository","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],"."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"This plugin features the ability to generate Deno applications and libraries inside of an Nx workspace. Obviously, all the other much-loved Nx features such as caching, affected commands and the project graph visualization work out of the box as well."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["To use Deno in an existing Nx workspace, just install the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"@nrwl/deno"}]," plugin:"]}],["$","$Ld",null,{"fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"npm i -D @nrwl/deno\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Then run the generator to create a new application:"}],["$","$Ld",null,{"language":"shell","fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"npx nx g @nrwl/deno:app mydenoapp\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Or generate a new library with:"}],["$","$Ld",null,{"language":"shell","fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"npx nx g @nrwl/deno:lib mydenolib\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"We're excited to see folks welcome in Deno APIs to their Nx workspaces and be able to easily share their Typescript packages across Deno, Node, and web applications, all inside the same monorepo."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Given this is still experimental, we're more than happy to receive feedback and hear about ways you are using Deno right now and/or plan to use it in an Nx workspace."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["To see some of this in action, be sure to check out our ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://youtu.be/Um8xXR54upQ","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"recent livestream with Caleb and working on this plugin:"]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"nx-console-intellij-support","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Nx Console — IntelliJ Support",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#nx-console-intellij-support","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 ",["$","iframe",null,{"src":"https://www.youtube.com/embed/xUTm6GDqwJM","title":"$undefined","width":"100%","allow":"accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; fullscreen","loading":"lazy","credentialless":"true","className":"rounded-lg shadow-lg"}],"$undefined"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Developer tool CLIs are known for being, well, command-line interfaces. Nx comes with many such CLI commands for scaffolding projects, running tasks, and more. We wanted to make some of this more approachable, so we introduced Nx Console, an extension to the Visual Studio Code editor. And it turned out to be highly successful. Nx Console now has over 1.2 million downloads on the ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=nrwl.angular-console","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Visual Studio Code marketplace","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],". We kept improving it over the years,"]}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":["adding support for ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://youtu.be/ZST_rmhzRXI","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"rendering the Nx graph","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://twitter.com/NxDevTools/status/1573323012476051456","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"providing IntelliSense","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," support for Nx configuration files"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://youtu.be/WfWmK1x52HE","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"integrating Nx Cloud","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["With the growing popularity, the ask for an equivalent extension for JetBrains' IntelliJ & WebStorm editors got louder and louder. At Nx, we're lucky to have an awesome community. ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://twitter.com/iguissouma","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Issam Guissouma","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," and ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://twitter.com/etkachev","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Edward Tkachev","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," from the Nx community jumped in and provided their implementation of Nx Console for IntelliJ."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Since our team ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/blog/from-bootstrapped-to-venture-backed","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"now works full-time on Nx","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," and the surrounding tooling, we decided to have a dedicated Nx Console extensions for IntelliJ and WebStorm that is actively maintained and developed by the core team. We reached out to Issam and Edward and started collaborating on it. The result can now be installed from the JetBrains marketplace:",["$","br",null,{}],["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/21060-nx-console","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/21060-nx-console","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 generators. Especially if you cannot recall all the various parameters, you can possibly pass. And sure, you could always pass the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"--help"}]," or browse ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/nx-api/react/generators/library","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"the docs","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],", but it is just less convenient."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","img",null,{"src":"/documentation/blog/images/2023-03-08/xFSreZ1G_zifIsdf.avif","alt":"","loading":"lazy"}]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["With a growing number of parameters that a generator can take, it started to get messy and overwhelming. Furthermore, in 80% of the cases, you would probably need the main parameters such as the name, bundler, and directory where to generate the output.",["$","br",null,{}],"This is the main reason we introduced a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"x-priority"}]," flag to our generator metadata, to have a way to prioritize certain flags and show them more prominently to the end user. Available values are ",["$","code",null,{"children":"important"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"internal"}],"."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["The property can be defined for the desired parameters in the generator's ",["$","code",null,{"children":"schema.json"}],":"]}],["$","$Ld",null,{"language":"json","fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"{\n properties and those marked with an ",["$","code",null,{"children":"x-priority: important"}]," will be shown at the top of both, the CLI output (when using ",["$","code",null,{"children":"--help"}],") Our main focus was on"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"allowing to have a non-bundled output, while still being able to modularize the codebase with local libraries"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"generating a pruned lock file when building in production mode"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"improving our docker setup to account for non-bundled output and properly install node packages"}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Check out the following video walkthrough on using these features for modularizing a Fastify application:"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-center","children":[" ",["$","iframe",null,{"src":"https://www.youtube.com/embed/LHLW0b4fr2w","title":"$undefined","width":"100%","allow":"accelerometer;
